neutralization_fail.signature: barra_ind_size->barra_l3 switch causes step2 ind_corr>0.4, size_corr>0.1
neutralization_fail.fix: Switching from barra_ind_size (with OLS neutralization) to barra_l3 (without) can turn a backtest_fail into a neutralization_fail when the factor concept has inherent industry/size clustering. Volume-based and momentum-based signals often exhibit strong sector biases. The neutralization was correctly masking these biases; removing it does not improve the signal — it just exposes the bias to step2 checks. Always verify whether a factor's cross-sectional IC survives neutralization before assuming the neutralization is the problem.
